A train travels 120 miles in 2 hours. At this rate, how many miles will it travel in 5 hours?
  • 300
  • 240
  • 360
  • 180
Which revision best improves the coherence of the following passage? "The scientist published her findings. The findings were surprising. The findings changed the field."
  • The scientist published her surprising findings, which changed the field.
  • The scientist published her findings, and they were surprising, changing the field.
  • Her findings were surprising; the scientist published them and changed the field.
  • NO CHANGE
